fields.Dash: The dash this is a button to.
fields.Screen: The screen this button triggers a switch to for.
fields._switchingEnabled: The field to drive with whether switching is enabled.
fields._screenEnabled: The field to drive with whether the screen is enabled.
fields._button: The button to trigger switching to the target screen.
fields._layout: The layout UIX element of the button.
fields._rootRect: The root Rect UIX element for this button.
fields._iconRect: The root Rect UIX element for the button's icon.
